title: ochrosia kilneri
intro: Ochrosia kilneri, also known as the Kilner's ochrosia, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, specifically Fiji, Samoa, and Tonga. It is a small tree or shrub with medicinal properties, particularly the bark, which has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ochrosia kilneri include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, making it a valuable herbal remedy in these regions. In traditional medicine, the bark is often prepared into a decoction or infused as a tea, highlighting its versatility in herbal preparations.
